allow: Bash(python -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) units = data.get\('rosterUnit', []\) targets = ['jabba','fennec','saw','hera','kestis','thirdsister','reva','sister'] for u in units: bid = u.get\('definitionId',''\).split\(':'\)[0].lower\(\) for t in targets: if t in bid: print\(u.get\('definitionId',''\)\) break ")
